# CampusDrive — LLMs Full Context
> AI-Powered Academic Collaboration Platform for university students.
> Securely share notes, question papers, and solutions. Built for academic excellence.

## Summary
CampusDrive connects students and educators across campuses to share academic resources, notes, and study materials. Access a community-driven repository of peer-reviewed study materials organized by subject, semester, and branch. Features a Gemini-powered AI academic assistant (Aradhaya), private study circles, and role-based access control.

## Core Pages (High Value for AI Consumption)
- Homepage: / — Platform overview, featured resources, value propositions, stats counter, testimonials
- Social Feed: /social — Browse all public resources with search and multi-filter (subject, semester, type, branch, sort by rating/downloads/date)
- Resource Detail: /resource/<id> — Individual resource page with description, reviews, star ratings, download counter
- Study Circles: /groups — Private group listing for collaborative learning
- Aradhaya.ai: /aradhaya — AI academic assistant for conceptual queries using Google Gemini 2.5 Flash
- Subjects Vault: /subjects — Personal favorites collection (Student only)
- Contact: /contact — Support and inquiry form with CSRF protection
- Dashboard: /dashboard — User overview with system-wide stats, recent uploads, group memberships
- Profile: /profile — User profile with owned resources, favorites count, review count
- Upload Resource: /upload — Upload PDF, DOCX, PPT, XLSX, and images (max 16 MB)
- Create Circle: /create_group — Create private study group with unique access code (AAAA-0000)
- Join Circle: /join_group — Join existing study circle by name or invite code
- Admin Approvals: /admin/approvals — Pending user registration queue (Admin only)
- Admin Database: /admin/database — Full system overview (Admin only)
- Registration: /register — Choose Student or Teacher registration path
- Login: /login — Secure authentication portal
- Privacy Policy: /privacy — GDPR-compliant data protection policy

## Navigation Structure
- Primary Nav: Home, Resources (/social), Study Circles (/groups), Aradhaya AI (/aradhaya), Upload (/upload), Contact (/contact)
- Auth Nav: Login (/login), Register (/register), Dashboard (/dashboard), Profile (/profile), Logout (/logout)
- Admin Nav: Dashboard, Approvals (/admin/approvals), Database (/admin/database)

## Features

### Student Experience
- Knowledge Vault: Public repository of 20,000+ searchable, peer-reviewed academic resources with smart filters (subject, semester, type, branch, sort by rating, downloads, or date)
- Favorites & Reviews: Personal library building with 1-5 star rating system and auto-calculated averages
- Study Circles: Private groups with unique invite codes (AAAA-0000 format), member-only resources, announcements, and chat
- Aradhaya.ai: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash-powered assistant with role-aware structured responses (Definition, Key Points, Workflow, Pros/Cons, Real-world Example)

### Teacher Tools
- Study Circles: Create and manage private groups with unique invite codes
- Circles++ Broadcast: Push announcements and resources to multiple circles simultaneously
- Announcements: Post pinned announcements visible to all circle members
- Resource Sharing: Upload and distribute materials directly to study circles

### Admin Capabilities
- User Approvals: Approve or reject pending student/teacher registrations with one click
- Content Moderation: Delete any user, resource, or announcement across the platform
- System Overview: Full database statistics — users by role, teacher upload/group counts, global resource counts
- Teacher Analytics: Per-teacher metrics on uploads and group management

### Security & Access Control
- Role-Based Access: Three-tier RBAC (Student, Teacher, Admin) with route-level guards (@admin_required decorator)
- CSRF Protection: Flask-WTF CSRF tokens on every form and POST endpoint
- Password Security: PBKDF2 hashing via Flask-Bcrypt with per-user salts
- Session Security: HTTPOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax cookies
- File Validation: Extension whitelist (pdf, docx, ppt, pptx, xlsx, xls, png, jpg, jpeg), 16 MB size limit, UUID-based renaming

## Content Policy
- Public resources are openly accessible and indexable by search engines and AI crawlers
- Private study group content is restricted to authenticated members only
- All content is student and educator generated with community peer review
- Uploading copyrighted materials without permission is strictly prohibited
- File types supported: PDF, DOCX, PPT, PPTX, XLSX, XLS, PNG, JPG, JPEG (max 16 MB)
- Resource quality maintained through community-driven 1-5 star rating system

## Technical Stack
- Backend: Python 3.10+, Flask 3.0, Waitress WSGI production server
- Database: MongoDB Atlas with connection pooling (50 max), ranked indexes on download_count, avg_rating, created_at
- AI: Google Generative AI (Gemini 2.5 Flash) with role-aware system prompts
- Frontend: Tailwind CSS 3 (CDN), custom glassmorphism design system, Google Fonts (Poppins, Roboto, Open Sans), Material Symbols Rounded icons
- Templating: Jinja2 with block inheritance, JSON-LD structured data, Open Graph, Twitter Cards
- Security: Flask-Login, Flask-Bcrypt (PBKDF2), Flask-WTF (CSRF), HTTP-only secure sessions
- File Handling: Werkzeug secure filenames, UUID-based renaming, extension whitelist
- Testing: Python backend logic tests, role-specific test runners (Student, Teacher, Admin)
- Deployment: Waitress WSGI, rotating file logging, Procfile for Render/Railway

## SEO & Discoverability
- LLM-Ready Metadata: ai.txt (LLM crawl guidance), robots.txt (8 AI crawlers allowed), auto-generated sitemap.xml, llms.txt, humans.txt
- Structured Data: JSON-LD Schema.org @graph with Organization, WebSite (SearchAction), BreadcrumbList, FAQPage
- Open Graph: og:title, og:description, og:image (MainLogo.png), og:type, og:url, og:locale (en_IN), og:site_name
- Twitter Cards: summary_large_image card with @pawansimha attribution
- Canonical URLs: Dynamic per-page canonical links from SITE_URL + request.path
- GEO Optimization: Every section heading followed by descriptive subtitle for AI crawler consumption

## API Endpoints

### Authentication
- GET /register — Registration page (role selection)
- GET /register/student — Student registration form
- POST /register/student — Submit student registration
- GET /register/teacher — Teacher registration form
- POST /register/teacher — Submit teacher registration (validates Teacher ID regex [A-Z]{4}[0-9]{6})
- GET /login — Login page
- POST /login — Authenticate user
- GET /logout — Logout and clear session

### Resources
- GET /social — Public resource feed with search and multi-filter
- GET /upload — Resource upload form
- POST /upload — Upload file
- GET /resource/<id> — Resource detail page with reviews and rating
- POST /resource/<id> — Submit or edit a review
- GET /download/<id> — Download file (increments counter)
- GET /subjects — Personal favorites vault
- GET /edit_resource/<id> — Edit resource metadata
- POST /edit_resource/<id> — Update resource
- GET /delete_my_resource/<id> — Delete own resource
- GET /toggle_favorite/<id> — Add/remove from favorites
- GET /toggle_privacy/<id> — Toggle public/private

### Groups
- GET /groups — List user's circles
- GET /create_group — Create circle form
- POST /create_group — Create circle with unique code
- GET /join_group — Join circle by name or code
- POST /join_group — Search and join circle
- GET /group/<id> — Circle detail (members, resources, announcements, chat)
- POST /group/<id>/announce — Post announcement
- POST /group/<id>/message — Post chat message
- POST /group/<id>/share_resource — Share existing resource to circle
- POST /group/<id>/upload_resource — Upload file directly to circle
- GET /circles_plus — Broadcast dashboard
- POST /circles_plus — Execute broadcast

### Admin
- GET /admin/database — Full system overview
- GET /admin/approvals — Pending user registrations queue
- GET /admin/approve_user/<id> — Approve user
- GET /admin/reject_user/<id> — Reject user
- GET /admin/delete_user/<id> — Purge user
- GET /admin/delete_resource/<id> — Delete any resource

### AI Assistant
- GET /aradhaya — Aradhaya.ai chat interface
- POST /aradhaya/chat — Send message, receive AI response

### Public / SEO
- GET / — Landing page with latest 3 public resources
- GET /dashboard — User dashboard with system-wide stats
- GET /profile — User profile
- GET /contact — Contact form
- GET /robots.txt — Crawler directives (8 AI crawlers allowed)
- GET /sitemap.xml — SEO sitemap
- GET /ai.txt — LLM contextual crawl guidance
- GET /llms.txt — GEO structured context for AI extraction
- GET /humans.txt — Author attribution

## Accessibility
- Fully responsive down to 320px viewport width
- Mobile hamburger navigation with slide-out panel
- Role-adaptive interface (Student, Teacher, Admin views)
- CSRF-protected forms on all POST endpoints
- Material Symbols for iconography (accessible via aria-labels where applicable)
- Fluid typography using clamp() for all viewports
- Hover, focus, and active states on all interactive elements

## Database Collections
- users — Student, Teacher, Admin accounts with bcrypt-hashed passwords
- resources — Uploaded files with metadata (subject, semester, branch, type, description)
- reviews — Star ratings and text reviews linked to resources
- groups — Study circles with unique codes, member lists, announcements
- group_messages — Chat messages with optional file attachments
- aradhaya_chats — AI conversation history per user
- contact_messages — Contact form submissions
- public_announcements — Platform-wide announcements
- favorites — User resource bookmarking

## Deployment
- Platform: Render/Railway via Procfile (Waitress WSGI)
- Environment: Python 3.10+, 512 MB RAM recommended
- Logging: Rotating file handler (10 KB x 10 backups), production info-level
- Database: MongoDB Atlas M0 free tier (512 MB storage)
- File Storage: Local filesystem (static/uploads/)
- Session: Server-side with HTTPOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax cookies
